headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Pipeline Update With New TYK2 And CELMoD Milestones
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) received U.S. FDA approval for Sotyktu (deucravacitinib) as the first TYK2 inhibitor for adults with active psoriatic arthritis. The company reported positive interim Phase 3 results for mezigdomide in relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. These updates add new depth to Bristol Myers Squibb’s immunology and oncology pipeline beyond previously discussed developments. For investors watching NYSE:BMY at a share price of $60.63, these two clinical milestones...

headline: BioNTech Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Corporate Update
summary: BioNTech on track for a catalyst-rich year with six late-stage data readouts expected across immunomodulators, antibody-drug conjugates and mRNA cancer immunotherapies Increased focus on PD-L11/VEGF-A bispecific immunomodulator pumitamig with eight global Phase 3 clinical trials planned to be ongoing for year-end in collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb Full year 2025 revenues of €2.9 billion2, net loss of €1.1 billion (adjusted3 net loss of €0.1 billion) and diluted loss per share of €4.70 ($
